channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Live updates: US Gulf allies fend off attacks as Trump warns Iran of ‘big wave’ of strikes - CNN
item.description:
1. Live updates: US Gulf allies fend off attacks as Trump warns Iran of ‘big wave’ of strikes  CNN
  2. Iran live: US embassy in Riyadh hit; Tehran closes Strait of Hormuz  Al Jazeera

  4. U.S. won’t rule out sending ground troops into Iran  The Washington Post
  5. Donald Trump struggles to explain why he launched another Middle Eastern war  Financial Times

item.title: UAE and Qatar Urge Allies to Help Trump Find Iran Off-Ramp - Bloomberg.com
item.description:
1. UAE and Qatar Urge Allies to Help Trump Find Iran Off-Ramp  Bloomberg.com

item.title: Intelligence assessment warns of Iranian attacks on US following Khamenei's death - Reuters
item.description:
1. Intelligence assessment warns of Iranian attacks on US following Khamenei's death  Reuters

item.title: About 10% of global container fleet caught in Hormuz backup, shipping CEO says - Reuters

item.title: We texted 1,000 Americans about U.S. strikes in Iran. Here’s what they said. - The Washington Post
item.description:
1. We texted 1,000 Americans about U.S. strikes in Iran. Here’s what they said.  The Washington Post
  2. CNN poll: 59% of Americans disapprove of Iran strikes and most think a long-term conflict is likely  CNN
  3. Opinion | How Trump's polling could impact the the Iran War  MS NOW
  4. Donald Trump Humiliated by New Poll Showing Nobody Believes His War Claims  The Daily Beast
  5. Just one in four Americans say they back US strikes on Iran, Reuters/Ipsos poll finds  Reuters

item.title: IDF strike kills Hezbollah intel chief; Lebanon to ban terror group’s military activity - The Times of Israel
item.description:
1. IDF strike kills Hezbollah intel chief; Lebanon to ban terror group’s military activity  The Times of Israel

item.title: France to boost nuclear arsenal and extend deterrence to European allies - BBC

item.title: The hole in the sky: How Middle East airspace closures are reshaping global aviation - CNN

item.title: Qatar Says It Shot Down Two Iranian Bombers - The New York Times
item.description:

item.title: Khamenei's Chosen Successor Could Offer Trump a 'Dream Deal' to End the Iran War - Haaretz
item.description:

item.title: 5 charts show China’s oil dilemma after US strikes on Iran - Politico
item.description:
1. 5 charts show China’s oil dilemma after US strikes on Iran  Politico

item.title: Iranian Kamikaze Drone Boat Makes First Successful Strike Of War - The War Zone
item.description:
1. Iranian Kamikaze Drone Boat Makes First Successful Strike Of War  The War Zone
  2. Iran starts ‘indiscriminate’ strikes across Gulf of Oman, hits shadow tanker tied to regime  Fox News

  4. Exploding drone boats have entered the Iran fight. Oman says one hit a tanker in a fatal blow.  Business Insider
  5. First oil tanker attacked in the Strait of Hormuz according to Oman  Euronews.com

item.title: Live Updates: U.S. death toll in Iran war rises to 6 as Trump says campaign could last 5 weeks - CBS News
item.description:
1. Live Updates: U.S. death toll in Iran war rises to 6 as Trump says campaign could last 5 weeks  CBS News
  2. 6 U.S. soldiers have been killed as the war with Iran further engulfs the region  NPR
  3. U.S. Military Death Toll in Iran War Rises to 6  The New York Times
  4. Fourth service member killed in Iran attack  CNN
  5. Six US service members killed in Iran conflict, US military says  Reuters
